美国总统 the President of the United States.

而你们面前的  是一位未经过选举的总统 Before you stood a president no one had elected.
但现在  那个人依然站在你们面前 But that same man stands before you now,
而黑暗时期已经过去 and the darkness is behind us.
国家现在情势大好  前途愈发光明 The state of the union is bright, and getting brighter.
我们遭遇过挑战  没错 We've had our challenges, yes.
尤其是跟俄国 Particularly with Russia.
的确有些很紧张的时刻 There were some tense moments, to be sure,

因为我们选民即将在 Because the votes our electorate casts
目前的初选和11月的大选中投的票 during the current primaries and the general election in November
